_schema: County day-labor posted at the Grange Hall. Rotation is weekday-driven (days_available uses CalendarManager weekday names) — deterministic, no RNG. pay is base cash; background_mult keys by background id (a mechanic is worth more in Roy's shop, a lifer on a fence line). rep = the handshake credit with the giver. Each job is once per day. blurb shows on the board; done_line shows after the work. Working 3+ total jobs sets county_hand (gossip hook).
_status: ai_draft_needs_director_curation (2026-07-06 — voice-locked to VOICE_GUIDE: dry, plainspoken, no exclamation marks)

jobs.name: Haul feed sacks for Sandy
jobs.blurb: Fifty-pound sacks off the truck and onto the pallet. Sandy counts them twice.
jobs.done_line: Grain dust in your collar. Sandy pays out of the till and doesn't make you ask.

jobs.name: Fence posts at Hollis's place
jobs.blurb: The line along the creek's been leaning since spring. Hollis digs slow these days.
jobs.done_line: Hollis holds each post while you tamp. Doesn't say much. Doesn't need to.

jobs.name: Shop help at Carver Equipment
jobs.blurb: Roy's backed up on service calls. He'd rather pay you than tell a customer no.
jobs.done_line: Roy watches you work for a while, then stops watching. That's his whole review.

jobs.name: Sort the parts wall for Gus
jobs.blurb: Forty years of hydraulic fittings in coffee cans. Gus knows where everything is. Nobody else does.
jobs.done_line: Gus looks at the sorted wall a long time. "Huh," he says. That's a compliment.

jobs.name: Untangle the Co-op's books
jobs.blurb: The delivery ledger hasn't matched the scale tickets since March. Marge wants a second set of eyes.
jobs.done_line: You find the double-entry from the wet week in April. Marge nods once and fixes it in pen.

jobs.name: Morning rounds with Dee
jobs.blurb: Dee's got three farms to hit before noon and two hands. Yours make four.
jobs.done_line: You hold the gate, the flashlight, and one annoyed goat. Dee calls it even and pays cash.
